sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports high blood pressure, difficulty with sugar intake, a sore throat, and a cough. He reports nasal congestion and is taking cough medication that is not working. The patient is drinking lots of water. The patient reports a cough.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is elevated. The patient has a runny nose. The patient is sneezing.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's diabetes is currently being managed. The patient has an upper respiratory infection. The patient has seasonal allergies.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Start metformin at a lower dose of 500 milligrams. Recommend coricidin hbp. Schedule follow-up in one week to assess response to medication. Advise patient to increase oral hydration and slow positional changes.
